full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++, 1 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Before filtering, 1 ml of the suspension containing cells and tissue pieces was taken out for Joonas. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

RBC lysis with 5 ml (both) for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. After RBC lysis and centrifugation, the final pellet was resuspended in 4 ml of media. For counting, a 1:10 dilution of the cell suspension was made.

Cell counts:

Made 1 aliquot with 1.5 E6 cells from the dispase dissociated cells

Made 2 aliquots with 1.5 E6 cells each from the dispase+C&H dissociated cells: unpurified and DCM FMO.

Took 2x 16.725 E6 cells for both positive and negative isolations to have the same amount of cells as in the prior time with S516_pOme

Biobanking

5 cryovials of 5E6 cells each were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

Magnetic-activated cell sorting (MACS)

Enriched CAFs from the dispase+C&H dissociated cell suspension using either positive or negative isolation.

Positive isolation: Enriching the fibroblasts using anti-fibroblasts beads (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-050-601) and an LS Column (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-042-401) in a QuadroMACS separator (Miltenyi)

Negative isolation: Depleting the sample from cancer and immune cells using a mixture of anti-EpCAM (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-061-101) and anti-CD45 (TIL) beads (Miltenyi, Cat: 130-118-780), and an LS column in a QuadroMACS separator.

Anti-fibroblast MicroBeads, CD326 (EpCAM) MicroBeads, and CD45 MicroBeads protocols by Miltenyi Biotec were used as guidance.

MACS buffer was prepared as follows: 49.55 ml DPBS (w/o MgCl2 and CaCl2) + 250 µl FBS + 200 µl EDTA to have 0.5 % FBS and 2 mM EDTA in DPBS. MACS buffer was prepared sterile and sterile-filtered before using it.

MACS buffer, cells, and beads were kept on ice. The beads were kept sterile and, therefore, worked inside a laminar hood until incubation with beads and buffer.

Used 16.725 E6 cells for both MACS protocols. Centrifuged the cells at 300 g for 10 min at +4C.

Using anti-fibroblast beads: The pellet was resuspended in 133.8 µl of cold MACS buffer (commercial protocol suggests 80 µl per 10 E6 cells). Added 33.45 µl of Anti-Fibroblast MicroBeads to the cell suspension (protocol: 20 µl per 10 E6 cells) and incubated 30 min at RT shielded from light. Washed the cells with 3 ml MACS buffer and centrifuged 300 g for 10 min at +4C. Lastly, the cells were resuspended in 500 µl of MACS buffer.

Using negative isolation: The pellet was resuspended in 433,1 µl of cold MACS buffer (calculation: the desired volume [500 µl] - the volume of both beads [2x 33.54 µl]). Added 33.45 µl of both anti-EpCAM and anti-CD45 beads to the cell suspension and incubated 30 min at +4C shielded from light. Washed the cells with 3 ml MACS buffer and centrifuged 300 g for 10 min at +4C. Lastly, the cells were resuspended in 500 µl of MACS buffer.

Two LS columns and 30 µm filters were placed in the magnetic MACS Separator. Prepared them by washing them with 3 ml of MACS buffer, then applied the cell suspension onto the column, and lastly, washed with 3 x 3 ml MACS buffer.

Columns were removed from the separator and placed on a new 15 ml falcon tube. 5 ml MACS buffer was added to each column and with firmly pushing the plunger into the column, magnetically labeled cells were flushed out.

All cell suspensions were centrifuged 300 x for 10 min and then resuspended in 1 ml FACS buffer. Counted the cells.

Flow cytometry

The conditions to stain were:

DCM FMO

unpurified

dispase dissociated cells

anti-fibroblast, flow-through

anti-fibroblast, column bound

negative isolation, flow-through

negative isolation, column bound

The aliquots were stained with the antibodies from the fibroblast panel according to the protocol.
